inputs.label: Roof Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single roof plane along the eave (horizontal).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single roof plane along the eave (horizontal).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir çatı yüzeyinin saçak boyunca yatay uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge einer einzelnen Dachfläche entlang der Traufe (horizontal).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'un plan de toit le long de l'avant-toit (horizontale).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de un plano de techo a lo largo del alero (horizontal).
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول سطح السقف الواحد على طول الأفريز (أفقي).

inputs.label: Roof Width
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal span from eave to ridge of one roof plane.

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal span from eave to ridge of one roof plane.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir çatı yüzeyinin saçaktan mahyaya yatay açıklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Horizontaler Abstand von Traufe bis First einer Dachfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Portée horizontale de l'avant-toit au faîte d'un plan de toit.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tramo horizontal desde el alero hasta la cumbrera de un plano de techo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة الأفقية من الأفريز إلى الحافة العلوية لسطح سقف واحد.

inputs.label: Pitch (rise per 12'')
inputs.businessContext: Roof pitch expressed as rise in inches per 12 inches of run (e.g., 4 for a 4/12 pitch).

businessContext_i18n.en: Roof pitch expressed as rise in inches per 12 inches of run (e.g., 4 for a 4/12 pitch).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 12 inç yatay mesafede yükselme miktarı (örneğin 4/12 eğim için 4).
businessContext_i18n.de: Dachneigung ausgedrückt als Anstieg in Zoll pro 12 Zoll Grundlinie (z.B. 4 für eine 4/12-Neigung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pente du toit exprimée en pouces d'élévation par 12 pouces de course (ex. 4 pour une pente 4/12).
businessContext_i18n.es: Pendiente del techo expresada como elevación en pulgadas por cada 12 pulgadas de recorrido (ej., 4 para una pendiente 4/12).
businessContext_i18n.ar: انحدار السقف معبرًا عنه بالارتفاع بالبوصة لكل 12 بوصة من الامتداد (مثل 4 لميل 4/12).

inputs.label: Number of Planes
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical roof planes (e.g., 2 for a standard gable roof).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical roof planes (e.g., 2 for a standard gable roof).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özdeş çatı yüzeylerinin sayısı (örneğin standart beşik çatı için 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Dachflächen (z.B. 2 für ein Standard-Satteldach).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de plans de toit identiques (ex. 2 pour un toit à pignon standard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de planos de techo idénticos (ej., 2 para un techo a dos aguas estándar).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد أسطح السقف المتطابقة (مثل 2 لسقف الجملون القياسي).

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra material to account for cutting waste and errors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of extra material to account for cutting waste and errors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve hata payı için ek malzeme yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz an zusätzlichem Material für Verschnitt und Fehler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matériel supplémentaire pour tenir compte des chutes et erreurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de material extra para tener en cuenta el desperdicio por corte y errores.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة المواد الإضافية لتعويض الهدر في القطع والأخطاء.

inputs.label: Bundle Coverage
inputs.businessContext: Area covered by one bundle of shingles (sq ft); typically 33.33 sq ft for 3-bundle squares.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area covered by one bundle of shingles (sq ft); typically 33.33 sq ft for 3-bundle squares.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir paket shingle'ın kapladığı alan (ft²); tipik olarak 3 paketlik kare için 33.33 ft².
businessContext_i18n.de: Fläche, die von einem Bündel Schindeln abgedeckt wird (Quadratfuß); typischerweise 33,33 sq ft für 3-Bündel-Quadrat.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface couverte par un paquet de bardeaux (pi²) ; généralement 33,33 pi² pour des carrés de 3 paquets.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área cubierta por un paquete de tejas (pies cuadrados); típicamente 33.33 pies cuadrados para cuadrados de 3 paquetes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المساحة التي تغطيها ربطة واحدة من القرميد (قدم مربع)؛ عادة 33.33 قدم مربع لربطة 3 لكل مربع.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
